posts.author: binod101 (Binod Chaudhary)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am developing 2 apps interacting with Monday.com. Both of them need to authorize in order to make subsequent request to Monday.com using GraphQL API. The authorization works smooth with one redirect_uri but if I put second redirect_uri I get an error “invalid redirect_uri” however there is a option to add multiple redirect URI. Does it work with multiple apps? Need help/suggestions on this.

Using this OAUTH (OAuth and Permissions)

Thank you.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @binod101 and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please send us an email to appuspport@monday.com so we ca take a closer look into this?

Looking forward to hearing from you via email!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: binod101 (Binod Chaudhary)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I havent heard back from email

posts.author: binod101 (Binod Chaudhary)
posts.cookedHtml: Sent the video regarding the OAuth issue.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @binod101,

Let’s continue this over email

Cheers,
Matias
